overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in cowboy attire walking through a scenic mountain valley with a river. The character is accompanied briefly by a dog as they traverse grassy terrain, rocky riverbanks, and overlook a rushing river with a distinctive rock arch visible in the distance.

events.description: a white dog enters from the right and begins walking alongside the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy path through the valley

notable_agents.action: dog walking parallel to the character on the grassy path

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall covered with patches of vegetation
lush green grass with scattered wildflowers and dirt patches
mountain range with snow-capped peaks visible through the valley
tall evergreen trees dotting the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow grassy valley flanked by steep cliff faces. A white dog appears and walks alongside as they traverse the lush green terrain. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the distant background between the valley walls.

events.description: the dog veers left and exits the frame
terrain transitions from grass to rocky dirt as the river comes into view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the river as the ground becomes rockier

entered.detail: flowing river with turquoise water becoming visible between rocks
uneven rocky terrain with patches of grass along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The dog departs as the character approaches the river, transitioning from grassy valley to rocky riverbank terrain. The path becomes uneven and wet near the water's edge, with the left cliff face receding into the distance.

events.description: character stops walking to stand and observe the river valley view

agents.ego_description: pausing on the rocky outcrop to look at the rushing river and distant formations

entered.detail: white water rapids where the river narrows between rock walls
large natural stone arch visible in the distant cliff face

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated rocky ledge directly beside the rushing river, the character pauses to take in the view. White water rapids churn below, and a distinctive rock arch formation becomes visible in the distant cliffs across the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley path toward rock arch

agents.ego_description: resuming walk along the path toward the large rock arch formation ahead

entered.detail: wider dirt and grass path leading through the open valley
scattered rock formations alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the immediate river edge onto a wider grassy path, continuing toward the large rock arch that dominates the view ahead. The river remains visible to the right but at a greater distance as the terrain opens into a broad valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow, enclosed valley into a vast, open mountain landscape dominated by a distant rock arch. It begins with the character walking through lush green terrain flanked by steep cliffs, accompanied by a white dog with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance. As the dog departs, the camera transitions from the grassy valley to an uneven, rocky riverbank where the left cliff face recedes to reveal the water's edge. The scene then shifts to an elevated rocky ledge overlooking churning white water rapids, pausing briefly to highlight a distinctive rock arch formation across the valley. Finally, the character moves away from the river onto a wider grassy path, as the terrain opens into a broad valley with the massive arch dominating the horizon.
